issues.comment: Primary lightness value changed from 30% to 70% during conversion, but should remain 30% to preserve original appearance. This will make text significantly lighter than intended.
Primary lightness value changed from 70% to 30% during conversion, but should remain 70% to preserve original appearance. This will make text significantly darker than intended.
Primary lightness value changed from 20% to 50% during conversion, but should remain 20% to preserve original appearance. This will make text significantly lighter than intended.
Primary lightness value appears to have changed from 20% to 20% in the conversion, but secondary is set to 80% instead of expected inverse relationship. Should verify intended contrast.
Primary lightness value changed from 30% to 50% during conversion, but should remain 30% to preserve original appearance. This will make text significantly lighter than intended.
